::: {.profile-lead}
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<img src="assets/images/dominik-tomaszuk.jpg" class="profile-photo" alt="Portrait of Dominik Tomaszuk" width="110">
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
![](assets/images/dominik-tomaszuk.jpg){.profile-photo width=110px}
:::

Dr Dominik Tomaszuk works in semantic technologies and graph-based knowledge representation, with research interests spanning the Semantic Web, Linked Data, graph databases, RDF, Property Graphs, data interoperability, data integration, and data modeling.
:::

::: {.split-grid}
::: {.content-panel}
**Research interests**

- Semantic Web
- Linked Data
- Graph Databases
- Knowledge Representation
- RDF
- Property Graphs
- Data Interoperability
- Data Integration
- Data Modeling
:::

::: {.content-panel}
**Profile**

Current work focuses on RDF and Property Graph interoperability, data integration, data modeling, schema languages, validation, and graph query language concepts, alongside open-source software for graph data conversion and analysis.
:::
:::
